Andrographis paniculata, commonly known as Andrographis, is an herbal plant used in traditional medicine for its health benefits. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory infections, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Andrographis paniculata include andrographolide, andrographolide acetate, andrographolide glucoside, and others, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Andrographis paniculata include tea, capsules, and tablets, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections, fever, and digestive issues.
